message:
fix(ci): add Playwright browser installation to unit-tests job

The unit-tests job was failing because Playwright browsers weren't
installed before running npm test. Added 'npx playwright install chromium'
step to fix the CI failure.

files.patch:
@@ -36,6 +36,10 @@ jobs:
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: node esbuild.config.js
 
+      - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        working-directory: packages/browser
+        run: npx playwright install chromium
+
       - name: Run unit tests
         working-directory: packages/browser
         run: npm test
